title: Tools, Resources, Prompts, and Server Instructions · Retrieval Circuit
summary: Design a minimal MCP surface for an internal knowledge and action service. Learners retrieve rules and procedures before seeing feedback. Planned artifact: Extend the evidence record for an MCP primitive and naming contract after a delayed changed case. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Expose actions as narrow tools with descriptive schemas and side-effect annotations.
Expose readable addressable context as resources or templates rather than action tools.
Expose reusable user-controlled prompt templates only when they improve discovery and composition.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:
"""Local MCP protocol and tool-contract portfolio."""

steps.title: Separate evidence from confidence
steps.instruction:
review case — Use a changed review case for agent ext mcp primitives that tests this competency: Choose the smallest primitive that preserves consent, discoverability, caching, and semantics.. Preserve inputs, constraints, an observable trace, and a boundary result.

Inspect the Primitive Choice trace for this review case. Which record connects a precondition, observed state change, and boundary result?
steps.why: The decision supplies observable evidence for choose the smallest primitive that preserves consent, discoverability, caching, and semantics.

content.text: For Primitive Choice, distinguish a claim from evidence by locating the relevant precondition, trace or invariant, and changed input result.

hints: Name the Primitive Choice precondition or invariant that the review case must preserve.

Trace this concrete case before choosing: Use a changed review case for agent ext mcp primitives that tests this competency: Choose the smallest primitive that preserves consent, discoverability, caching, and semantics.. Preserve inputs, constraints, an observable trace, and a boundary result.
Use the documented misconception as a counterexample target: Tools, resources, and prompts are interchangeable.

stimulus.title: Primitive Choice case record
stimulus.caption: Three excerpts from a learner evidence packet; only one connects a claim to a reproducible check.

lines.label: assumption
lines.text: Use a changed review case for agent ext mcp primitives that tests this competency: Choose the smallest primitive that preserves consent, discoverability, caching, and semantics.. Preserve inputs, constraints, an observable trace, and a boundary result.

lines.label: risk
lines.text: Tools, resources, and prompts are interchangeable.

lines.label: evidence
lines.text: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Choose the smallest primitive that preserves consent, discoverability, caching, and semantics. Artifact under review: an MCP primitive and naming contract.

options.text: The record names the assumption, applies Primitive Choice, and reports a changed-case check tied to the stakeholder decision.

The Primitive Choice record says an MCP primitive and naming contract looks right but supplies no governing condition, observation, changed case, or counterexample. This does not resolve separate evidence from confidence.

For separate evidence from confidence, apply Primitive Choice without its stated preconditions, omit the an MCP primitive and naming contract trace and counterexample, and treat one plausible output as complete proof. This does not satisfy Primitive Choice for an MCP primitive and naming contract.

steps.title: Retrieve the complete evidence cycle
steps.instruction: Order the Tool Contracts evidence cycle for this review task before implementing it.
steps.why: Correct order keeps Tool Contracts assumptions visible before execution and verifies its result against a boundary case afterward.

steps.title: Record what required effort
steps.instruction: Write the review evidence note for Primitive Choice: explain the governing condition, one failure, and how this concrete case was verified — Use a changed review case for agent ext mcp primitives that tests this competency: Choose the smallest primitive that preserves consent, discoverability, caching, and semantics.. Preserve inputs, constraints, an observable trace, and a boundary result.
steps.why: Retrieving Primitive Choice through the concrete an MCP primitive and naming contract case exposes causal gaps that recognition alone can hide.

content.title: Evidence defense
content.text: Use the case, one assumption, one observable result, and one limitation. Do not copy the competency statement: Choose the smallest primitive that preserves consent, discoverability, caching, and semantics.
